title: BatchPublishResponse
description: Results of a batch publish operation.

is_partial_error.description: Whether some messages in the batch failed to publish. If true, check individual message results for failures.

message_ids.description: Map of array index (as string) to individual publish result. Keys correspond to positions in the submitted payloads array.

message_id.description: Unique identifier assigned to the published message.

result.description: Result status for this individual message.
